title: The Souvenir Shop
content: Near the main square, Daniel found a small souvenir shop filled with colorful items. Shelves displayed postcards, magnets, keychains, and handmade crafts from the region. He spent nearly an hour looking at different products and deciding what to buy. Eventually, he chose a small wooden figure for himself and several gifts for family members. The shop owner wrapped everything carefully and thanked him for visiting. Daniel liked bringing home souvenirs because they helped him remember special places and experiences long after a trip ended.
